test.description: FAIL-BY-DESIGN regression guard for bug C2: odd-length address (39 hex) MUST be rejected. Geth returns -32602 'hex string of odd length'. Nethermind v1.38.0-rc silently left-pads via AddressConverter and returns a nonce, so it FAILS this guard until fixed. Expected: PASS on Geth, FAIL on NM.
